mapper.select: select id, user_id, title, content, created_at, updated_at from posts order by id desc
select id, user_id, title, content, created_at, updated_at from posts where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into posts (user_id, title, content) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content})
mapper.update: update posts set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
